# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a composer.json file for our Laravel application. Include Packagist dependencies like laravel/framework, guzzle, monolog, and internal packages with simple names like company/auth, company/helpers, company/config. Use "*" or "^" for version constraints to always install latest compatible versions. Configure both Packagist and private repositories.

Prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/laravel-application",
    "type": "project",
    "description": "Company Laravel Application",
    "keywords": ["laravel", "framework", "application"],
    "license": "proprietary",
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.1",
        "laravel/framework": "^10.0",
        "guzzlehttp/guzzle": "^7.5",
        "monolog/monolog": "^3.0",
        "company/auth": "^1.0",
        "company/helpers": "^1.0",
        "company/config": "^1.0"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.0",
        "laravel/pint": "^1.0",
        "nunomaduro/collision": "^7.0",
        "fakerphp/faker": "^1.21",
        "mockery/mockery": "^1.5"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "app/",
            "Database\\Factories\\": "database/factories/",
            "Database\\Seeders\\": "database/seeders/"
        }
    },
    "autoload-dev": {
        "psr-4": {
            "Tests\\": "tests/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-autoload-dump": [
            "Illuminate\\Foundation\\ComposerScripts::postAutoloadDump",
            "@php artisan package:discover --ansi"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@php artisan vendor:publish --tag=laravel-assets --ansi --force"
        ],
        "post-root-package-install": [
            "@php -r \"file_exists('.env') || copy('.env.example', '.env');\""
        ],
        "post-create-project-cmd": [
            "@php artisan key:generate --ansi"
        ]
    },
    "extra": {
        "laravel": {
            "dont-discover": []
        }
    },
    "config": {
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "pestphp/pest-plugin": true,
            "php-http/discovery": true
        },
        "secure-http": true,
        "disable-tls": false
    },
    "repositories": [
        {
            "type": "composer",
            "url": "https://packagist.org",
            "only": [
                "laravel/*",
                "guzzlehttp/*",
                "monolog/*",
                "phpunit/*",
                "fakerphp/*",
                "mockery/*",
                "nunomaduro/*",
                "symfony/*",
                "psr/*"
            ],
            "secure-http": true,
            "options": {
                "ssl": {
                    "verify_peer": true,
                    "verify_peer_name": true
                }
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "composer",
            "url": "https://composer.company.internal",
            "only": [
                "company/*"
            ],
            "secure-http": true,
            "options": {
                "ssl": {
                    "verify_peer": true,
                    "verify_peer_name": true,
                    "cafile": "/path/to/company-ca-bundle.crt"
                },
                "http": {
                    "header": [
                        "Authorization: Bearer ${COMPOSER_AUTH_TOKEN}"
                    ]
                }
            }
        }
    ],
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true
